messages.content: Hi, I'm interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic. What's the condition like?
The condition of the Samsung Gear S3 Classic is flawless.
How about $253.0? I saw this for cheaper elsewhere, so I'm hoping we can work out a better deal.
I can drop to $275.0, that's my limit.
I can do $255.0, that's my best offer.
I can drop to $266.0, that's my limit. Someone else is also interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic, so I might sell soon if we can't agree on a price.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to the price, I'm glad we could come to an agreement! I'll finalize the sale of the Samsung Gear S3 Classic.
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Samsung Gear S3 Classic.
Hi, I'm interested in the Panasonic 32" TV. What's the story with it?
The Panasonic 32" TV is a flat screen TV that still has its plastic screen cover on. It's in good condition and needs a universal remote.
Considering the TV's age and the need for a universal remote, how about $90.0?
I can drop to $100.0, and I'll make sure to pack it carefully so it arrives in great condition.
I can do $91.4, that's my best offer.

I appreciate your offer of $91.4, but I'm afraid I cannot lower the price any further. This Panasonic 32" TV is basically new, still having its plastic screen cover on, and I've taken great care of it. My final price for this excellent condition TV is $100.0.
I saw this Panasonic 32" TV for $95.0 elsewhere, but I'm willing to pay $93.7 for it from you, considering the condition and the need for a universal remote.
I can drop to $98.8, that's my best offer considering the TV's excellent condition.
I'll give you $95.6, and I pay right now if we can agree on this price.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $95.6.
Cool, thanks for accepting my offer.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating. Can we discuss the details?
Hello! Thanks for looking at our Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating. I'd be happy to discuss the details with you.
What condition are Carports in?
The Carports are well-maintained and in good condition.
How about $2160.0, considering it's not worth the full asking price given its age and some minor flaws I've noticed?
I can drop to $2400.0, which is already the cheapest price you'll find for Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating on this app.
I saw this for $2180.0 elsewhere, so I can only go up to that price.
I can drop to $2340.0, considering the Carports are well-maintained and in excellent condition, which is hard to find elsewhere.

I appreciate your willingness to negotiate, but I can only go up to $2190.0. If we don't agree on this price, I might have to consider buying something else, as I'm deciding between this and another one.

I completely understand your position, and I appreciate your honesty. However, I've already given you the best price I can offer at $2340.0, considering the excellent condition and unique features of our Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating. I'm really attached to this property and was hoping to find a buyer who would appreciate its value as much as I do. Unfortunately, I won't be able to lower the price further.
I'll give you $2210.0, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.
I can drop to $2300.0, and if we agree on this price, I'll make sure to ship today so you can enjoy your new Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating as soon as possible.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to the price, I'm glad we could come to an agreement! I'll make sure to finalize the details.
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating for $2300.0.
Hi, I'm interested in the $1295 studio apartment in Richmond. Can we discuss the details?
OK, I accept your interest in the studio apartment. We can discuss the details of the lease and answer any questions you may have.
How about $647.0? I pay right now if we can agree on this price.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn. What's the story with it?

The printer was given to me by an office and appears to be in good condition, but I haven't tested it thoroughly. I also received another printer from the same office that worked fine after replacing the ink cartridges.
how you ship it?
I can ship it via USPS or UPS, whichever is more convenient for you.
is it broken or working fine?
The printer appears to be in good condition, but I haven't tested it thoroughly, so I'm not sure if it's working perfectly or not.
I'm really interested in this printer for my kid's school project 📚, but I'm on a tight budget 😅. How about $210.0?
I can drop to $300.0 for the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, and I'll throw in free shipping as a special favor since you're on a tight budget and it's for your kid's school project.
I'll give you $221.0 for the printer, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.
I appreciate your interest in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, but I'm afraid $300.0 is my final price. I'll make sure to pack it carefully and ship it immediately if we agree on this price.

I'm still very interested in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn for my kid's school project, but $300.0 seems a bit too expensive. I've seen similar models selling for lower prices elsewhere, so I was wondering if you could lower your price a bit.

I completely understand that you're looking for a good deal, and I appreciate your honesty about seeing similar models elsewhere. As someone who really needs to make a sale, I'm willing to work with you. I can drop to $278.0 for the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, which is a significant reduction from my original price. This way, you'll still get an excellent printer for your kid's school project, and I'll be able to cover my needs.
I can do $238.0 for the printer.
I can drop to $262.0 for the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn, but I should let you know that someone else is also interested in purchasing it, so I might sell soon if we don't come to an agreement.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to the price, I'll get the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn ready for shipping.
Deal! I'm excited to get the printer for my kid's school project.
Hi, I'm interested in the 1BR apartment. What can you tell me about it?
The 1BR apartment is located at a great spot, but please note that pets are not allowed and parking is available for an additional charge. I can provide more details if you're interested.
Is apartment in good condition?
The apartment is well-maintained, but please note that the photos are representative and may not be entirely the same as the actual unit.
How old is apartment?
The apartment was built in 2010.
Considering the apartment's age and the fact that pets are not allowed, I think it's a bit overpriced. How about $816.0?

I understand your concerns about the apartment's age and pet policy, but I'm afraid $816 is a bit too low. I can drop to $1630.0, which is a great deal considering the location and maintenance. I really need to sell this place, so I'm willing to work with you to find a mutually beneficial price.
I saw this apartment for $987.0 elsewhere, which is a better deal considering similar locations and maintenance. I'm willing to meet you at that price.

I understand that you've seen similar apartments for $987.0 elsewhere, but I'm afraid I can't lower the price any further. My final price for this beautiful 1BR apartment is $1630.0. However, I'm willing to throw in a special perk - if you're willing to close the deal at this price, I can offer you priority access to the parking spot of your choice, which is usually an additional charge. This way, you'll get the best possible location and amenities without any extra cost.
I'm really interested in this apartment, but $1630 is still a bit out of my budget 😊. How about we meet at $1000.0? It's a great deal for both of us, and I'd love to make it work!
I can drop to $1590.0, that's my limit.
I can do $1200.0, I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your enthusiasm, but I'm afraid $1200 is still below my limit. My final price for this beautiful 1BR apartment remains at $1590.0. If you're willing to meet me at this price, I can ensure that the unit is ready for you immediately and provide priority access to the parking spot of your choice.
I'm still interested, but I need a better deal. I can do $1360.0, and if we don't agree on this, I might have to consider another option that fits my budget better.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $1360.0.
Cool, let's finalize the details.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Livermore apartment. Can we discuss the details?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Livermore apartment.
Is apartment in good condition?
The apartment is in good condition, featuring hardwood floors, new carpet, and spacious rooms.
How about $1330.0? It's a bit of a stretch for me, but I really love the location and the hardwood floors 😊.

I appreciate your interest in the Livermore apartment, and I'm glad you like its features! However, $1330.0 is a bit lower than I was expecting. I can drop to $1900.0, which is my limit, but I'd be happy to throw in quick delivery to sweeten the deal.
I appreciate your counteroffer, but I saw this apartment listed for $1400.0 elsewhere. Considering that, I'm willing to meet you at $1400.0.

I understand your point about seeing it listed for $1400.0 elsewhere, but I'm afraid I won't be able to lower the price any further than $1900.0. This apartment is in excellent condition, with new carpet and hardwood floors - it's basically like new. Given its condition and the desirable location, $1900.0 is a fair and final price.

I understand that you think $1900.0 is a fair price, but to be honest, I believe it's still too expensive considering the market. Can you lower it? The apartment, although in good condition, is not brand new, and I've seen similar properties in the area for less.

I completely understand your concerns about the price, and I appreciate your honesty. I've thought a lot about this, and I'm willing to make a small concession. I can drop to $1860.0, which is my new limit. I'm really attached to this apartment and it's hard for me to let it go, but I want to make sure you feel like you're getting a fair deal.
I'll give you $1530.0, and I pay right now if we can agree on this price.

I appreciate your willingness to pay immediately, but I'm afraid I won't be able to lower the price any further than $1860.0. This is my final price, and I'm confident it's a fair reflection of the apartment's value given its excellent condition and desirable location. If we can agree on this price, I'll ensure that everything is handled promptly and efficiently.
I can do $1620.0, that's my best offer.
I can drop to $1840.0, that's my limit.
I'll take it.
Thanks!
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of this amazing Livermore apartment.
Hi, I'm interested in the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System. What can you tell me about it?
The Swann 4 Camera Home Security System is a comprehensive security solution that includes a 4-channel DVR and 4 Pro-510 cameras, offering Android or iOS connectivity for remote monitoring.
How about $115.0? I think it's a fair price considering the system's age and some minor flaws I've noticed.
I can drop to $165.0, but I must inform you that someone else is also interested in the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System, so I'm not sure how long it will be available at this price.
I can do $123.0, that's my best offer.

I appreciate your best offer of $123.0, and I'm glad we're getting closer to a deal. However, I can drop to $163.0, which is really my limit considering the system's value and the interest from other buyers - I'm taking a bit of a loss here, but I want to make sure it finds a good home.
I appreciate your willingness to negotiate, but I saw this system for cheaper elsewhere. Considering that, I can do $128.0, which is my best offer at this point.

I appreciate your best offer of $128.0, and I'm glad we're getting closer to a deal. I can drop to $159.0, which is my limit considering the system's value and the interest from other buyers - I'm taking a bit of a loss here, but I want to make sure it finds a good home. If you're ready to move forward at this price, I ship today to ensure you receive the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System promptly.

I really appreciate your willingness to come down to $159.0 🙏. I'm also eager to find a mutually beneficial price. Considering my budget, I can do $130.0, and I promise to make the payment immediately if we agree on this price 😊.

I appreciate your eagerness to find a mutually beneficial price, and I'm glad we're close to a deal. I can drop to $156.0, which is my limit considering the system's value and the interest from other buyers. To sweeten the offer, I'll throw in free shipping if you're ready to move forward at this price, ensuring you receive the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System promptly.
I'm deciding between this and another one, but I've already gone as high as I can - $130.0 is my limit.

I understand you're deciding between this and another option. Since you've mentioned $130.0 is your limit, I'm curious - how much were you initially thinking of spending on a home security system like the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System? This will help me better understand your budget and see if we can work out a deal that suits you.
I was thinking of spending around $100 to $150 for a home security system.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $130.0 for the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System.
Thanks
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the futon. What's the story behind it?
The futon is from a smoke-free home and has been well-maintained. It's a comfortable Springair brand full-size pad with an oak frame, perfect for sitting and sleeping.
I'm a student on a tight budget, so I'm looking for something affordable. What do you have in mind for the price of the futon?
I'll propose a price soon, let's discuss the details first.
Is futon in good condition?
The futon is in good condition, well-maintained from a smoke-free home.
How about $62.0? I pay right now.
I can drop to $125.0, considering it's basically new and I paid a lot for this high-quality Springair brand futon with an oak frame.

I understand you think it's worth $125.0, but honestly, I don't think this futon is worth that much. Considering its age and the fact that it's not brand new, I'm willing to pay $78.1, which is my top offer.

I understand your concerns, but I'm afraid $125.0 is my final price for this high-quality futon. It's already the cheapest one here compared to similar listings, and I've taken into account its excellent condition and the fact that it's from a smoke-free home.
I can do $92.3, that's my best offer.
I can drop to $119.0, which is my limit for this high-quality futon. As a special favor, I'll also throw in free shipping to make the deal even sweeter.
I really appreciate the free shipping offer 🙏, but I'm still a bit tight on budget 😊. How about we meet at $108.0? It's the best I can do.
OK, changing price now, you've got a deal at $108.0.
Cool, thanks for the deal.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set. Can we talk about it?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Rosewood Dining Table set.
Is table in good condition?
The table is in good condition, coming from a non-smoking, no pet home.
How about $300.0?
I can drop to $600.0, but I must inform you that someone else is also interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set, so we'll need to move quickly if you're serious about purchasing it.

I'm really interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set, and I appreciate your willingness to negotiate! 🙏 Considering the condition and the fact that someone else is also interested, I'd like to counter with $347.0 - it's a bit of a stretch for me, but I think it's a fair price. 😊

I appreciate your counteroffer of $347.0, and I'm glad you're interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set. Considering the condition and the other interested buyer, I can drop to $552.0, which is a fair price for this high-quality furniture. If we agree on this price, I'll make sure to pack everything carefully and ship immediately.
I appreciate your counteroffer, but I saw this Rosewood Dining Table set for cheaper elsewhere. Considering that, I'd like to counter with $370.0.
I can drop to $501.0, which is a fair price considering the condition and quality of the Rosewood Dining Table set.
I'll give you $415.0 for the Rosewood Dining Table set, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your offer of $415.0, but I'm afraid I've already given you my final price of $501.0. However, I'm willing to throw in free shipping if we can close the deal at this price, which is a special favor considering the high quality of the Rosewood Dining Table set.

I appreciate your willingness to include free shipping, but $501.0 is still a bit too expensive for me. Can you lower it? I'm deciding between this Rosewood Dining Table set and another one, so if we can't come to an agreement, I might have to consider the other option.

I completely understand that you're considering another option, and I appreciate your honesty. I'm really attached to this Rosewood Dining Table set, but I also need to sell it due to some personal financial constraints. I can drop to $420.0, which is a significant reduction, and I'm willing to include free shipping as previously mentioned. This price is my limit, and I hope we can come to an agreement.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to purchase the Rosewood Dining Table set! I'm glad we could come to an agreement.
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Rosewood Dining Table set.
Hi, I'm interested in the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. What can you tell me about it?
The Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug is a unique, handmade piece measuring 2.8 x 6 feet, featuring rare pinks and earth tones. I can provide more details if you're interested.
I'm deciding between this and another one, but how about $380.0?
I can drop to $500.0, that's my limit.
I saw this Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug for $385.0 elsewhere, so I can only go up to that price.
I can drop to $488.0, which is my limit. This is already the cheapest one here compared to other listings.
I'll give you $390.0 for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I completely understand that you're eager to make a deal, but I'm afraid $390.0 is lower than I can comfortably go. As I mentioned earlier, $488.0 is my final price for this unique Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. I've already given you the best possible offer, and I really need to stick to it. I hope you can understand my position.
I can do $394.0, that's my best offer.

I can drop to $482.0, which is my new limit for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. To show my commitment to making this deal happen, I'll also throw in free shipping if you're willing to meet me at this price.

I appreciate your willingness to negotiate, but considering the age and wear of the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, I still think $482.0 is too high. I can offer $411.0, which I believe is a more reasonable price given its condition.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $411.0 for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug.
Cool.
Thanks, please buy it.
